user_story: As an Employee, I want to apply a new travel request, so that I can seek approval for an upcoming business trip
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Travel Requests screen; When I click Apply travel request and submit the trip details; Then a new travel request is created and appears in my list

user_story: As an Employee, I want to view my travel requests in a list with title, trip details, requested advance and status, so that I can track the progress of my trips
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Travel Requests screen; When the page loads; Then my travel requests are listed with Title, Trip details, Requested advance (₹), Status and Task columns

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my travel requests by a From and To period, so that I can review requests within a specific date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Travel Requests screen; When I set a From and To date and click Search; Then only travel requests within that period are shown

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my travel requests by status such as Initiated, Approved, Completed or Travel Coordinator Confirmed, so that I can focus on requests in a particular state
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Travel Requests screen; When I select a status and click Search; Then only travel requests with that status are displayed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to reset the filters, so that I can clear selections and view all travel requests again
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied period or status filters; When I click Reset; Then the filters are cleared and the full list is restored

user_story: As an Employee, I want to refresh the travel requests list, so that I can see the latest approval and settlement status
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Travel Requests screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list is reloaded with current data
